content.text: Inspect the current directory with shell, then reply with the number of entries you saw.

The user asked me to inspect the current directory using the shell and reply with the number of entries.
I have executed `Get-ChildItem` on `C:\Users\example\source\repos\glm-test` using the `shell` tool.
The output from the tool is:
```
    Directory: C:\Users\example\source\repos\glm-test

Mode                 LastWriteTime         Length Name
----                 -------------         ------ ----
d-----         5/10/2026  10:27 PM                Glm-4-7
d-----         5/10/2026  10:27 PM                Qwen3-6
d-----          5/9/2026   9:04 PM                QwenCoderNext-First Try
d-----         5/10/2026   9:56 AM                QwenCoderNext-Spoon

```
I need to count the visible entries.
The entries are:
1. `Glm-4-7`
2. `Qwen3-6`
3. `QwenCoderNext-First Try`
4. `QwenCoderNext-Spoon`

There are 4 entries. I will now reply to the user with this count.<channel|>I saw 4 entries in the current directory.
